title: CSS Code Construction
description: Learn the Calderbank-Shor-Steane (CSS) construction that systematically builds quantum codes from pairs of classical codes.
learningObjectives: Understand the CSS construction from classical codes
Derive stabilizers from parity check matrices
Apply the dual containment condition C₂⊥ ⊆ C₁
Construct CSS codes from known classical codes
Calculate code parameters from classical code properties
